testcase.name: test_proxy_batch_shrinks_after_3_visit_job
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration17_per_use_deletion.py:361: in test_proxy_batch_shrinks_after_3_visit_job assert len(items_after) == 2, ( E AssertionError: Expected 2 proxies left after 3-visit job, got 3: ['192.0.2.3:8080:u3:p3', '192.0.2.4:8080:u4:p4', '192.0.2.5:8080:u5:p5'] E assert 3 == 2 E + where 3 = len(['192.0.2.3:8080:u3:p3', '192.0.2.4:8080:u4:p4', '192.0.2.5:8080:u5:p5'])

testcase.name: test_ua_batch_shrinks_after_3_visit_job

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 2 UAs left, got 3: ['Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 13; SM-S903B) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36', 'Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 13; SM-S904B) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36', 'Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 13; SM-S905B) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36'] assert 3 == 2 + where 3 = len(['Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 13; SM-S903B) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36', 'Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 13; SM-S904B) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36', 'Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 13; SM-S905B) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36'])

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration17_per_use_deletion.py:403: in test_ua_batch_shrinks_after_3_visit_job assert len(items_after) == 2, ( E AssertionError: Expected 2 UAs left, got 3: ['Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 13; SM-S903B) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36', 'Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 13; SM-S904B) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36', 'Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 13; SM-S905B) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36'] E assert 3 == 2 E + where 3 = len(['Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 13; SM-S903B) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36', 'Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 13; SM-S904B) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36', 'Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 13; SM-S905B) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36'])

testcase.name: test_proxy_batch_auto_deleted_when_all_items_consumed
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration17_per_use_deletion.py:430: in test_proxy_batch_auto_deleted_when_all_items_consumed assert after == {} or after is None, ( E AssertionError: Expected upload doc deleted after full consumption, still have: {'id': 'a6d956c2-6f9c-4292-af55-7574411efb9d', 'user_id': 'cb959f2b-681a-4419-a62b-9a7bce67a08d', 'type': 'proxies', 'name': 'TEST_iter17_proxies_ed708a', 'os_tag': None, 'network_tag': None, 'country_tag': 'US', 'state_tag': None, 'items': ['192.0.2.3:8080:u3:p3'], 'item_count': 1, 'file_name': None, 'created_at': datetime.datetime(2026, 4, 25, 15, 8, 22, 75000), 'consumed_count': 2, 'updated_at': '2026-04-25T15:10:27.012553+00:00'} E assert ({'consumed_co...e': None, ...} == {} E E Left contains 14 more items: E {'consumed_count': 2, E 'country_tag': 'US', E 'created_at': datetime.datetime(2026, 4, 25, 15, 8, 22, 75000), E 'file_name': None, E 'id': 'a6d956c2-6f9c-4292-af55-7574411efb9d',... E E ...Full output truncated (30 lines hidden), use '-vv' to show or {'consumed_count': 2, 'country_tag': 'US', 'created_at': datetime.datetime(2026, 4, 25, 15, 8, 22, 75000), 'file_name': None, ...} is None)
